title: 10 best herbal essential oils for oily hair
description: Cloves essential oils helps with oily hair because it has natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties that help to control sebum production. The oil's strong aroma also stimulates blood flow to the scalp, which can help to reduce excess oil secretion. Additionally, cloves essential oil has astringent properties that can help to absorb excess moisture and purify the scalp, leaving hair feeling cleaner and lighter....
